title: carex onoei var. krameri
intro: Carex onoei var. krameri, also known as the Japanese sedge, is a perennial plant species native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex onoei var. krameri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
